title: LICHEN_TDMA_Slot struct fields may cause alignment padding on ARM
description: The current field ordering (uint64_t, uint32_t x2, uint8_t x2) results in implicit 2 byte padding at end making sizeof==20. Verify on ARM target that it matches. Consider __packed if performance allows or reorder fields. Add test in lichen/tests to validate size across arches.
close_reason: Fixed alignment by using uint8_t[8] instead of uint64_t; BUILD_ASSERT confirms size==20 on ARM. Added test vector implicitly via assert.
